name: abrdn Precious Metals Basket ETF Trust
summary: PART I The purpose of the abrdn Precious Metals Basket ETF Trust (the Trust) is to own, in an agreed proportion, gold, silver, platinum and palladium (collectively, Bullion) transferred to the Trust in exchange for shares issued by the Trust (Shares). Each Share represents a fractional undivided beneficial interest in and ownership of the Trust. The assets of the Trust consist solely of Bullion. The Trust was formed on October 18, 2010 when an initial deposit of Bullion was made in exchange for ...
